title: Herobrine011840's Dungeons
description: This mod adds new overworld dungeon structures.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVAJokfGfgM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/550/herobrine011840s-dungeons-png.png)


This mod adds a bunch of new dungeons to your world.

Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/herobrine011840s-dungeons)

## Dungeons

# Diorite Tower:

![Diorite Tower](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/542/2025-03-11_18-34-05-png.png)

This is a small structure found in Mountain biomes. It contains some supplies, along with maps to other dungeons.



# Badlands Settlement:

![Badlands Settlement](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/541/2025-03-11_18-33-23-png.png)

These structures are small houses found in Wooded Badlands. Illagers live in the houses, and the houses contain chests with supplies and maps.



# Crypt:

![Crypt](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/543/2025-03-11_18-34-18-png.png)

This is a common structure found in Forest biomes. There will be a surface exposed staircase that lead to a small room with a Trial Spawner (Normal Spawner on 1.20.1 versions) and some loot, including maps.



# Undead Dungeon:

![Undead Dungeon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/544/2025-03-11_18-34-34-png.png)

This is the first of the main underground dungeons. It is found often in most Overworld biomes and contains a few spawners and chests, which can contain a new Armor Trim and Music Disc.



# Lost Gardens:

![Lost Gardens](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/545/2025-03-11_18-34-51-png.png)

This is a rare variant of the Undead Dungeon. It is found in areas with much plant life (Specifically flowers) and consists of massive halls with loot and spawners.



# Illager Dungeon:

![Illager Dungeon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/549/2025-03-11_18-36-25-png.png)

This dungeon is a medium-level dungeon, with many spawners. There are lots of mazelike rooms in this structure, which can contain Spawners, chests, and Vaults. A Boss room can be found occasionally, with a Vindicator Spawner in the center and either an Evoker, Illusioner, or Ravager accompanying it.



# Netherite Forge:

![Netherite Forge](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/546/2025-03-11_18-35-21-png.png)

This uncommon structure is a variant of the Illager Dungeon. It can have some Netherite guarded by Pillagers and Vindicators, with Evokers and Illusioners spawning rarely. The dungeon has at least three floors, with most rooms being connected by a central core.



# Warden Dungeon:

![Warden Dungeon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1123/547/2025-03-11_18-36-07-png.png)

This structure is one of the rarest and most difficult structures in this mod. It is absolutely massive, with many repeating rooms and potentially hundreds of chests, which can contain a lot of Diamonds and Netherite. If you are playing the 1.21.4 version of this mod, there are Ominous Vaults in this structure, and you can get the keys for them rarely in Trial Chambers.



Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
